ops.text:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED. Independent recompute from raw parquet reproduces every E26 headline number.

- Inputs byte-identical to _base-20260719 snapshot (SHA256 match) — no data manipulation.
- Distances: recomputed d_qwen (own Qwen/Qwen3-8B offline load), d_word, d_char for all 470+48 pairs. Positional per-pair diff vs E26 per_pair.csv = 0 across all three metrics (max abs 0.0), 0 id/split order mismatches, 0 identical-flag/category mismatches.
- Metric validity: hand-rolled DP Levenshtein agrees with rapidfuzz on cross-check sample (0/4 fails) — the edit-distance quantity is independently correct.
- Aggregates: my verify_summary.json matches E26 summary.json EXACTLY (0 diffs at 1e-12) across all 3 populations x 3 tokenizers x {quantiles, histogram, small_edit_share+CI, n_identical, share_lt_*} + decision.
- Primary (train, d_qwen): small_edit_share = 21/470 = 0.044681, bootstrap 95% CI [0.027660, 0.063830] (10k, seed=26) — reproduced exactly. median 0.789, mean 0.723, std 0.234. High-distance mass 71+68+52=191/470 in [0.85,1.00) confirmed. n_identical(train)=5 confirmed.
- Robustness: train word/char small_edit_share = 23/470=0.0489 both; test=1/48=0.0208; combined=22/518=0.0425 — all reproduced.
- Pre-registered rule applied as registered: small-edit iff d<0.20; train primary share >=0.30 -> bakeoff, else skip DPOP. 0.0447 << 0.30 -> bakeoff_warranted=FALSE. NO goalpost move.
- E26 is NOT a PENDING-E15 experiment: $0 pure-compute probe, directly-measured edit distance, pre-registered mechanical threshold rule, no LLM judging / no score-instrument dependence. The skip-DPOP recommendation is the registered decision-feed output, not an instrument-gated promote/kill verdict — within protocol.
- Spend: $0 confirmed (no LLM calls needed; pure edit-distance compute).

Note (not a defect): dataset `id` is non-unique in train (470 rows / 402 unique ids; e.g. 7c0c862961e4 at rows 29 & 30 with distinct distances). E26 aggregates use positional arrays, so this is harmless; a naive id-keyed re-derivation would undercount (my first cross-check hit this and was corrected via positional comparison).

Artifacts: E26-verify/recompute.py, out/verify_summary.json, out/verify_per_pair.csv.
